meta.title: Anagram_01
meta.author: Nicholas
meta.instructions:
**How to Play**

Fill the 7×7 grid. The letters in the intersections of your answer can be unscrambled to find the hidden word

- Click a square to focus it.
- Type to fill.
- Arrow keys move within the active bar.
- At grid intersections, arrowing across the other direction toggles the active bar.
- Tab / Enter cycles through clues. Shift+Tab goes back.
- Space advances one cell.

clues.h2: Twins, but not boys; stands against
clues.v3: Keeps watch over, gates to other dimensions
hidden: Harsh facts of life, or one of the people of Moses (9)
